basic_details.job_title: GVHSS Keonjhar Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Government Vocational Higher Secondary School Keonjhar
basic_details.short_information: Government Vocational Higher Secondary School Keonjhar (GVHSS Keonjhar) has released an official notification for the recruitment of Guest Faculty in MLT Trade Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 16-06-2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Guest Faculty in MLT Trade: Not completed 65 years of age.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with 55% marks (preference to M.D in Pathology/ Microbiology/ Path and Bact./ Biochemistry)
qualification.details: Guest Faculty in MLT Trade: MBBS with 55% marks. Preference to M.D in Pathology/ Microbiology/ Path and Bact./ Biochemistry.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs.400/- per class/lecturer of 45 minutes duration subject to a ceiling of maximum 40 classes with Rs. 16,000/- per month.
salary_details.details: Guest Faculty in MLT Trade: Rs.400/- per class/lecturer of 45 minutes duration subject to a ceiling of maximum 40 classes with Rs. 16,000/- per month.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for GVHSS Keonjhar Guest Faculty in MLT Trade Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 16-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download GVHSS Keonjhar Guest Faculty in MLT Trade Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Guest Faculty position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Guest Faculty in MLT Trade position at GVHSS Keonjhar is 16th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Guest Faculty post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree with at least 55% marks. Preference will be given to those with an M.D. in Pathology, Microbiology, Path and Bact., or Biochemistry.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: Applicants should not have completed 65 years of age as of the application deadline.

faq.question: Q4. How will the candidates be selected for the Guest Faculty position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an interview and certificate verification. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in these stages.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the Guest Faculty in MLT Trade?
faq.answer: The salary is Rs. 400/- per class/lecturer of 45 minutes duration. There is a monthly ceiling of Rs. 16,000/- for a maximum of 40 classes.

faq.question: Q6. How should I send my application?
faq.answer: Applications should be sent via email, including your CV, scanned copies of self-attested certificates, testimonials, photograph, and other academic credentials.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Guest Faculty in MLT Trade at Government Vocational Higher Secondary School Keonjhar.

faq.question: Q9. When is the interview and certificate verification scheduled?
faq.answer: The interview and certificate verification for the Guest Faculty position will be conducted on 18th June 2026.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The engagement for the Guest Faculty in MLT Trade position is temporary.
